arts.ttl: Thursday’s briefing: Liverpool marches on and Arsenal faces another setback
arts.sum: The Reds swatted aside Newcastle to take another step towards a second Premier League title.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Victor Osimhen drops hint on future as Gunners 'make contact' for transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal next face PSV Eindhoven in the Champions League but already some attention is being paid to the summer transfer window in north London as the Gunners eye targets

arts.ttl: Liverpool stroll as Arsenal stutter in Premier League season-defining Wednesday
arts.sum: Liverpool took one huge step towards the Premier League title on a packed Wednesday saw many top teams play in matches with huge implications.

arts.ttl: How Liverpool's fixtures compare to Arsenal's after midweek Premier League action
arts.sum: How Liverpool's next five Premier League fixtures compare to Arsenal's after the midweek action.

arts.ttl: Match of the Day: Why injuries mean Arsenal are failing to score
arts.sum: Match of the Day's Stephen Warnock explains why a "vulnerable" and injury-hit Arsenal are failing to score following their 0-0 draw against Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's next five fixtures compared to Liverpool after Premier League title race blow
arts.sum: Arsenal's hopes of winning the Premier League took another hit on Wednesday night as they drew 0-0 at Nottingham Forest to likely lose even more ground on Liverpool. March 9 vs Manchester United (A) at 4.30pm - Premier League

arts.ttl: Arsenal player ratings vs Nottingham Forest as Merino blanks again, Trossard and Odegaard quiet - Tom Canton
arts.sum: Both Gabriel Magalhaes and William Saliba had to put in massive tackles on Chris Wood in the game, last-ditch moments that showcased the strategy of the home side, to absorb pressure and hit on the break. The Italian gave what he always does, a solid display, calmness and accurate passing and was replaced midway through the first period after a solid game.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta names one thing Arsenal lack after falling 13 points behind Liverpool
arts.sum: Arsenal fell 13 points behind Premier League leaders Liverpool after failing to beat Nottingham Forest on Wednesday night - while seeing Arne Slot's men defeat Newcastle at Anfield

arts.ttl: Arne Slot insists Liverpool will 'forget about the Premier League' and focus on PSG now after 2-0 Newcastle win puts them 13 points clear of Arsenal
arts.sum: Liverpool moved closer to the Premier League title as goals from Dominik Szoboszlai and Alexis Mac Allister saw off Newcastle - and Arsenal dropped points with a goalless draw at Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: 'We lacked spark' - strikers who could be 'final piece of Arsenal jigsaw'
arts.sum: Arsenal, Manchester United and Chelsea are among the sides looking for a new striker in the summer. BBC Sport takes a look at who could head to the Premier League.
